comp_warn_too_late: Team consists of too many late-game heroes. You might get crushed early.
comp_warn_too_early: Lethal early-game team! Focus on finishing the game quickly.
comp_warn_low_cc: Team lacks Crowd Control (Stun/Slow). Initiating team fights will be very hard.
comp_warn_no_frontline: Team has no Frontline (Tank/Support). You need someone to soak damage.
comp_warn_all_physical: Team is entirely physical damage based. The enemy can easily stack armor.
macro_jungler_early: Early Game Dominance: Your jungler is very strong early. Contest the first Turtle aggressively and prioritize early ganks.
macro_jungler_late: Late Game Scaling: Your jungler needs items to scale. Avoid unnecessary 5v5 team fights until the 12-minute Lord and focus heavily on farming.
macro_gold_lane: Safe Scaling: Play safely in the Gold Lane. Clear minions under your turret and avoid being aggressive alone until you complete core items.
macro_exp_lane: Split Pushing: Maintain map pressure in the EXP lane. Join Turtle fights, but split push side towers whenever the enemy groups up.
macro_mid_lane: Rotation Engine: Clear Mid Lane quickly and roam the map with your Jungler. Keep your rotation and gank potential high at all times.
macro_roamer: Vision & Peel: Protect your carries and provide vision by securing brushes. You should be the one to initiate and absorb key enemy spells.
macro_default: Balanced Approach: Mind your positioning in team fights, focus on map objectives (Towers, Lord), and avoid getting caught out of position.
macro_tip_animation_cancel: Pro Mechanic (Animation Cancel): Cancel the ending frames of your skill animations with a movement command or basic attack to increase your overall Burst speed.
macro_tip_basic_reset: Pro Mechanic (Basic Break): Use your specific skills immediately after a basic attack lands to bypass the attack speed delay and deal unexpected burst damage.
macro_tip_wave_management: Pro Mechanic (Wave Management): The fate is decided early. Hard push the first 7 minion waves and permanently rotate with your jungler for Turtle/Invade setups.
dash_no_matches: You haven't played any matches yet. Add your first match to activate the AI Coach!
verdict_greeting: Looking at your last {{count}} matches, here is my analysis:
verdict_needs_data: Play and record more matches for me to analyze your playstyle!
verdict_high_kda: Excellent! You have a massive impact on the games with a shiny KDA. Keep dominating the map.
verdict_low_kda: You seem to be struggling a bit. Try to position safer and focus on farming rather than fighting early on.
verdict_high_deaths: Warning! You are dying too much. Even if you get kills, giving away gold hurts the team. Play more conservatively.
verdict_supportive: Great teamwork! You are enabling your team well, but make sure you don't sacrifice yourself unnecessarily.
verdict_losing_streak: Also, you've had a streak of losses recently. A short break might do you good.
draft_desc: Select your hero and potential enemy threats before the match. Your AI Coach will recommend the optimal tactical setup.
draft_awaiting: Select your hero from the left to view recommendations.
form_desc: Log your match details to train the AI Coach and keep track of your performance.
form_err_generic: An error occurred while saving the match.
note_flawless: Flawless performance! You dominated the game. Keep this form up!
note_good_kda: Solid gameplay! Your KDA ratio is well above average.
note_too_many_deaths: You gave the enemy too much gold by dying {{deaths}} times. Position yourself better.
note_high_assists: Excellent team participation! However, try to secure more eliminations.
note_feeder: A tough game. Focus on farming safely and surviving instead of engaging.
note_neutral: An average game. Review your replays to find areas for improvement.
draft_note_healer: There is high HP regen (Healers) on the enemy team, definitely start with an Anti-Heal item.
draft_note_burst: Athena's Shield will keep you alive against sudden (Burst) magic damage.
draft_note_tank: You need %HP damage items to melt the enemy tanks.
draft_note_assassin: Take a defensive position against physical assassins.
draft_note_safe: Play safe in the early game with {{heroName}}, focus on completing your core items.
heroes_desc: Explore hero details, MLAnalyzer approved core builds, and emblem setups.
leaderboard_empty: No players in the leaderboard yet.
winprob_reason_neutral: Balanced team composition, individual skill will define the outcome.
winprob_reason_greedy_late: Low win probability. Draft is too greedy with Late Game heroes; you might get crushed early on.
winprob_reason_rush_early: Low win probability. Early game-focused draft; if the match extends past 15 minutes, you will heavily fall off.
winprob_reason_no_cc: Low win probability. Your team lacks Crowd Control (CC)! Teamfights will be extremely difficult to manage.
winprob_reason_hard_counter: Highly advantageous! Your drafted heroes perfectly counter the enemy's weaknesses.
winprob_reason_countered: Disadvantage! The enemy team severely counters your chosen composition.
winprob_reason_meta_abuser: High win probability. An extremely strong lineup consisting almost entirely of S+/S Tier (Meta) heroes.
winprob_reason_solid_draft: High win probability. A very solid team composition with excellent synergy and sufficient crowd control.
ocr_error_low_confidence: Cannot read the image securely. Please ensure it's a clear screenshot of the Match Result.
ocr_error_no_data_found: Could not identify KDA digits from the image. Please enter manually.
ocr_error_engine_failed: Vision Engine failed to boot. Please check your image or enter values manually.
